entry.title: Re: WBS - Project with Revenue - Margin Analysis not updated
entry.content:

It's difficult to get the cause without system access.

Maybe you can consider to check the filter setting for the app.

Also compare with Journal Entry Analyzer for the actual journal entries created.

Best Regards,
Owen

entry.title: Re: Unable to Create the GL account groups in the CBC
entry.content:
The account group should start with only letters 'Z' or 'Y', no other letters are allowed.

Best Regards,
Owen

entry.title: Re: #COE#BUMA Using Teams and Responsibility on both PR and PO Workflows

entry.title: Re: Increase decimals in currency
entry.content:
Unfortunately in Public Cloud system at present, it is not supported to change decimal places for currency codes which is the similar configuration as OY04 in on-premise.

Best Regards,
Owen

entry.title: Re: Functional differences between BOI's and API's

entry.title: Change Default mta.yaml filepath in BTP CICD pipeline config.yaml
entry.content:
I have a full stack multi-tenant project. This repository has two MTA's. One is for the CAP related artifacts which is in the root directory. The other is inside the app folder which holds the artifacts related to the frontend(UI5). 

Now I need to setup my pipeline in BTP CICD. I added the github repository and tried to create a job. 
Herein I understood, if I select buildtool as mta, it searches for mta.yaml file in the root directory of repository. 
The thing is I need to setup two jobs one should pick mta in root directory and deploy in provider subaccount and other should pick mta from app folder and deploy it in subscriber subaccount. 

Is there any other option which we can set in config.yaml file inside .pipeline folder which will override the default mta.yaml filepath or atleast set the mta file name like mta-ui.yaml ??


@Nikitha09 

or is there any other way to achieve this?

SAP Continuous Integration and Delivery

entry.title: Re: FORM TEMPLATE FOR OUTGOING CHECK IN SAP S/4HANA, PUBLIC CLOUD
entry.content: Added Localization tag, please remove other tags.

entry.title: Re: FORM TEMPLATE FOR OUTGOING CHECK IN SAP S/4HANA, PUBLIC CLOUD
entry.content: Informed expert.

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud - Hide prices on invoice
entry.content:
Hi @rubenpeijs ,

In SD sales documents and Billing documents we have a concept called Role based access to Price elements this functionality can be used for sales order or in Billing documents to control the access to the condition in SD documents. The following access can be defined to a condition No access, display only and change access based on the Business role.
Use the No access to prevent the display of the condition to certain business roles or for all business roles.

Refer the SAP document for more info:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/a376cd9ea00d476b96f18dea1247e6a5/bf9f70beb3bb4258be53846b6363c52b.htm

Hope this helps!!!

Thanks and Regards,
Suryaprakash.

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud for planning - Advanced Formula "LINK" is not working
entry.content: I would suggest you to use trace feature within DA designer to see if there is any data read

entry.title: Re: Exported the Model did some changes, which is not ref...
entry.content: There might be nothing wrong there.  The first screenshot shows your updated fact( data of year 2023 and 2024) through upload . But that doesn't change the master data of date dimension. In your second screenshot, you can also see the valid time range of your date dimension is from 2020 to 2024. So you should see member of 2021 in your date dimension.

entry.title: Re: Sales Invoices for Export sales with payment of IGST...
entry.content:
Hi @Bhavesh_Bhorde ,

From the above question I can understand that we need to add the IGST, condition for the export sales only for some customer right or we will have IGST only some sales orders even when the customer is same? or pls correct me if am missing something.

If the control is required based on the customers that is only some customer will have IGST then we can use the TAX category IGST with classification(0 or 1).

The tax percentage will be determined based on the material's IGST tax category classification value and customer's IGST tax category classification value 0 and 1.
We can maintain in the condition record whenever the customer's IGST Tax category classification is 0, irrespective of the material tax category the Tax percentage should be Zero.

Tax classification needs to be entered in the Sales Areas --> Taxes --> Tax category IGST or in Sales org data --> Billing Tab.

Hope this helps!!!!

Thanks and Regards,
Surya.

Hi,

Thank you for your prompt response. I hope you are doing well.

The note you referred to, KBA 3141420, appears to address issues related to reprinting voided or cashed cheques, which does not seem to apply to my current situation. My concern is not about voided or cashed cheques but rather about printing a cheque for a payment that I made through the "Post Outgoing Payment" function. could not find any option to print the cheque. Could you please guide me on how to print the cheque for the payment document in this scenario? Looking forward to your guidance.

entry.title: Which way of S4 Hana system implementation is suggested, if client is new to SAP and or old to SAP?
entry.content:
Hi experts,

Ref. to subject mentioned. can you through some light on it.!

Because, yesterday I have attended an interview for SAP Head position in Hyd in a product based company especially a Manufacturing industry, they were saying they are using sap from past 20 years (this is a bid wonder?), but the company is 30 years old. and recently 2 years ago they have to SAP S4 Hana system.

However still they are not happy, says that they have lot of gaps in their system after implementing SAP S4Hana, not sure, if they have implemented green field implementation (meaning from the scratch, need to build the organization into new S4 Hana ERP system, Fiori based).

And also said that, they have these concerns mentioning below: 

-1). People issue (might be their company people /business have not cooperated and or supported during migration)

-2). Data inputs have not given properly,

-3). Systems issues

feeling, all these because the work is not done properly in the first 3 phases of Activate methodology. Discover, Prepare and Explore phases were not fully utilized, meaning the activities and or task were not well taken care, is it not?

Otherwise, they have now still gaps, and the management were not happy, cause they reports or dash board are not meeting as per their expectation, due to that, management is not able to take proper decision and or they is a delay in that or lagging... resulting in that, they are not satisfied it seems. And they said that, it as implemented by a Pune based sap implementation partner.!

but one thing asked since they are old to sap 20 years, still their system is not fully stabilized.. so is it not because of something else, that is just influence of owners? because its a private limited company. One man army show, so feeling sap have developed a methodology to utilize and implement the new system for their industry for better way of digitization of their enterprise right?  And the results are as expected, provided when the companies follow better, and leverage all the best practices and implemented, right?

So, need your expert opinion, what might be the causes, best possible suggestions.!

Appreciate your expertise thoughts.!

Thanks in advance,

Regards.

Er.K.S.

entry.title: Subsequent adjustment of Transfer Price in PCA Valuation
entry.content:
In chemical industry certain raw material price is controlled via government authorities. These prices are only published at the month end. Goods are transferred between Profit Centres using Transfer Price in Profit Center Valuation.

At the month end customer updates the transfer price based on new information received.

The requirement is to revaluate material movements between profit centres with a new determined transfer price at month end. At the moment no standard solution is available for this requirement.

Material Ledger with Actual costing is implemented and Raw Materials has price control 'S'.

Please do let us know if any custom solution can be implemented for such scenarios or already implemented by you. The guidance will be appreciated. 

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Crystal Report Viewer Chart Font Issue
entry.content:
Got the Report, right, it doesn't have the ability to add attachment either but I got it from your drop box.

I noticed you don't have any printer selected so it's using GDIPlus32.dll to format and some of your default printer properties.

It can cause issues moving the report from PC to PC, so always highly recommended to use a real printer.

Once you do that send me the new report.

I do see there is a difference.

Go into Page Setup and select a real printer, save the report and test again. Check on Dissociate also.

Then when you select File, Print you'll see a printer saved and listed on the dialog box I used my default:

I'll send it off to R&D and see what they have to say...

Don

entry.title: Re: Crystal Reports 13.0.27 Issue: PDF Conversion and Pri...
entry.content:
Likely some Windows update caused the problem.

Is Windows 10 even supported anymore, quick check it is for another year:

Important

Windows 10 will reach end of support on October 14, 2025. The current version, 22H2, will be the final version of Windows 10, and all editions will remain in support with monthly security update releases through that date. Existing LTSC releases will continue to receive updates beyond that date based on their specific lifecycles.

Try SP 36 which you can download from here:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/crystalreports/3354091173.html

See my blog on upgrading your project:

Upgrading a Visual Studio 2008->2022 .NET project with the latest CR .NET SDK packages

entry.title: BYD2408 Remittance Advice form template sender selection
entry.content:
Hi SAP Support!


To my understanding, the sender logic varies by document type, but in general the system selects the sender with this hierarchy, where if a sender can't be found at one step it falls back to the next:
1. Document-level rules. *I believe Remittance Advices send based on the owner of the original document the RA is related to but don't see off-the-shelf documentation to confirm this*
2. Output Channel select rules.
3. Default sender maintained in Business Configuration.

Can you confirm if this is correct, and if so what the logic is behind the document level sender selection rules for Remittance Advices and where it might be found in the off-the-shelf documentation for ByDesign?

Regards,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: BYD2408 Remittance Advice form template sender selection
entry.content:
The system determines the sender of a remittance advice using a hierarchical logic, ensuring flexibility and control over how communication is sent:

  1. Document-Level Sender: By default, the sender is typically the owner of the document that triggered the remittance advice, such as the payment run owner or invoice owner.

  2. Output Channel Rules: You can configure the output channel (e.g., email) to use a specific sender address, like a generic AP email. This rule overrides the document-level owner and allows for centralized email communication.

  3. Default Sender: If neither of the above applies, the system will use the default sender email address defined in the system's Business Configuration settings.

By adjusting the output channel rules, we can ensure that all remittance advices are sent from a predefined generic AP email rather than the individual document owner.

entry.title: Re: I am using exit_saplkedrcopa_001 for enhancement to p...
entry.content: Functional recreated KEDR and issue got resolved

entry.title: pm maintenance order document flow
entry.content:
In the PM (Plant Maintenance) module of SAP S/4HANA 2022, I've encountered an issue where, after performing a technical completion (TECO) on a maintenance order, the associated purchase requisition (PR) no longer appears in the document flow. In previous versions, the purchase requisition would still be visible in the document flow even after the maintenance order was technically completed.

  • Is this change in the document flow display after TECO a standard behavior in SAP S/4HANA 2022?
  • Is there any configuration setting that controls the visibility of purchase requisitions in the document flow after a maintenance order is technically completed?
  • How can I ensure that the associated purchase requisition remains visible in the document flow after TECO?

I would appreciate any insights or guidance from the community experts. Thank you very much!

entry.title: Re: pm maintenance order document flow
entry.content: Before performing technical completion (TECO), I can see the purchase requisition (PR) in the document flow of the maintenance order. However, after technical completion, the PR no longer appears in the document flow.

entry.title: Assigned objects in QM01/QM02
entry.content:
Hello People,

I'm trying to create a custom object category Material(ZMA ), I had followed every step. i.e define object category, implementing BAdi(BADI_QNAO_OBJCAT) and the configuring for a notification type.I have also added Material and Materail Description in Include QNAOS_OBJ_DATA_BATCH_UI of structure QNAOS_OBJ_DATA_UI. 

But Material and Material Description columns not being displayed in assigned objects tab.

I want to display as in below screenshot next to SLED/BBD

Please find the screenshot.

entry.title: CAP Node JS Event Mesh Consume Message failed with payload chunks buffer
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I've posted a message to Event Mesh using httprest protocol like that

With json payload

const messageData = {
                        "test": "test"
                    };
 
On EventMesh consumer apps istream 
.on("data", async (oMessage)
i got payload with payload.data is null but payload.chunks[0].data have data 
Step 0.1 Message: {"source":{"address":"default/test","reliable":true,"persistent":false,"redelivered":false},"target":{},"payload":{"chunks":[{"type":"Buffer","data":[123,34,116,101,115,116,34,58,34,116,101,115,116,34,125]}],"type":"application/json","encoding":null,"data":null,"properties":null}}
 
Then i'm trying to parse chunks buffer like that

I've succcess parse message on BAS, VS Code with code of logic above (and real payload i got from BTP apps logs)

 


 

but i got error  when i deployed to Cloud foundry

stacktrace":["TypeError [ERR_INVALID_ARG_TYPE]: The first argument must be of type string or an instance of Buffer, ArrayBuffer, or Array or an Array-like Object. Received undefined"," at Function.from (node:buffer:319:9)"," at IncomingStream.<anonymous>

Please give me advice

1. Do i need change some config, add any header, params... to post message to Queue with message.payload.data for consumer instead of message.payload.chunks[0].data

2. If can't post message to queue with payload to message.payload.data then how can i resolve Buffer parse error above?

FYI:

- Checked node version on BAS, VSCode, Cloud Foundry is same also, set node engines in package.json as well

Thanks in advance

ABU DHABI, ​ＡＢＯＲＴＩＯＮ　ＰＩＬＬＳ FOR SALE IN MILNERTON/ERMELO,RANDFONTEIN,TEMBISA CENTRAL,SOMERSET,CENTURION,HUMANSDORP,TAUNG,MELMOTH,VREDE WhatsApp ((( (+27) 0633867063)))

entry.title: why I count see my pr in the document flow after technical completion
entry.content:
In the PM (Plant Maintenance) module of SAP S/4HANA 2022, I've encountered an issue where, after performing a technical completion (TECO) on a maintenance order, the associated purchase requisition (PR) no longer appears in the document flow. Before technical completion, I can see the PR in the document flow, but after technical completion, it disappears. In previous versions, the purchase requisition would still be visible in the document flow even after the maintenance order was technically completed.

  • Is this change in the document flow display after TECO a standard behavior in SAP S/4HANA 2022?
  • Is there any configuration setting that controls the visibility of purchase requisitions in the document flow after a maintenance order is technically completed?
  • How can I ensure that the associated purchase requisition remains visible in the document flow after TECO?

I would appreciate any insights or guidance from the community experts. Thank you very much!

entry.title: Re: Let's ask for a change in the "draw signature" component
entry.content:
I don't know, but this is the only way that worked for me. So I suggest using the same to have the maximum impact.

They also said:  "I would suggest that you create a new requirement in our customer influence session: https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/campaign/3325" but the login was unsuccessful.

entry.title: Is it possible to perform HU creation during Transfer Posting in EWM?
entry.content:
Hello,

I am working on a scenario where my Storage type is HU managed.

Process : 

MIGO from S4 with 311 from SLOC A to SLOC B ,both EWM managed

Once received the the Transfer posting document in EWM>> create WT>>Confirm WT.

But as my PUTAWAY storage Type is HU managed with HU creation is not posible to create HU. system is giving error 

"no bin search possible. storage types/sections/bin types incomplete" 

Here my question is can i perfrom HU creation during the WT creation using PACKSPEC . i tried it but system is not creating any HU.

Thanks

Arjun

entry.title: Re: Issue with uploading multiple line items data of Purh...
entry.content:
Dear Snehal9,

In this specific case, we need proper investigation as the result in Widgets depends on how the data extracted, transformed, and widget configured (and/or metrics configured if used). Therefore, we kindly ask you to open a ticket via SAP for Me (Login with S-User and Password) with as much information as possible, such as workspace id, what source system, any out-of-box templates/value accelerator used, etc. This way, you will be in direct contact with our support team.

Here is a step-by-step guideline on how to open a ticket via SAP for Me. In case, you are facing issues in the ticket creation, feel free to reach out to signavio_success@sap.com or to our Customer Interaction Center.

Thank you and kind regards

Ascha (Virtual Customer Success Team - SAP Signavio)

entry.title: Re: Message no. F5103
entry.content: Message number F5103

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Petoberfest 2024
entry.content: #petoberfest #devtoberfest

entry.title: Re: Signavio Process Insights: insufficient data collecti...
entry.content:
Hi ronyx86,

In this specific case, we need proper investigation. Therefore, we kindly ask you to open a ticket via SAP for Me (Login with S-User and Password) with as much information as possible, such as license type (RISE, Partner, Full, Discovery), workspace id, which source system with R3 opened, screenshots (if available). A few example of troubled PPIs such as KFFI000106 if more. 

This way, you will be in direct contact with our support team. Here is a step-by-step guideline on how to open a ticket via SAP for Me. In case, you are facing issues in the ticket creation, feel free to reach out to signavio_success@sap.com or to our Customer Interaction Center.

Thank you and kind regards

Ascha (Virtual Customer Success Team - SAP Signavio)

entry.title: Re: how to add a field in ALV of transaction IW47
entry.content: Isn't it obvious when you debug? The field you think you have added to the internal table (<LS_DATA> is one line) is in fact not added, hence defining your field in the field catalog makes it dump. Are you sure that the enhancement spot you have implemented to add your field is active in your system? (ES_RIAFRU20)

entry.title: MD01 MRP Run should create only one PR for multiple material but same contract
entry.content: While using MD01 for MRP Run, the objective is to ensure that if there is a single contract for multiple materials, only one Purchase Requisition (PR) is created instead of multiple PRs. How to achieve this? Can we enhance MD01?

entry.title: Couldn't subscribe to SAP Build Process Automation: Subscription Failed
entry.content: I am trying out free trial, but when I tried to subscribe to "SAP Build Process Automation" it failed with a message "Couldn't subscribe to SAP Build Process Automation: Subscription Failed" tried twice and failed both the time. It does not show any reason as such, it says try again later. It is pretty straight forward process I believe as I am following steps as per the tutorial. Is there any prerequisite to be able to get it working?

entry.title: Re: Change Default mta.yaml filepath in BTP CICD pipeline config.yaml
entry.content:
Hi @gregorw ,

We are adhering to the following strategy:

Provider Subaccount - CAP Apps will be deployed.
Consumer Subaccounts - UI5 Apps will be deployed.

In this scenario, we have multiple consumer subaccounts where I need to deploy the UI5 Apps on each, utilizing the MTA defined for the UI5 application.

We will be using single repository for both backend and frontend.

entry.title: Re: Change Default mta.yaml filepath in BTP CICD pipeline...
entry.content: I would suggest you have a look at my https://github.com/gregorwolf/mtxs-bookshop example. There I use the service: build-workzone-standard with service-plan: standard. That way you have a launchpad experience directly after subscription and you don't need to deploy the UI5 apps to the subscriber subaccount in an extra step. Right now I'm researching in the branch flp-content-exposure if I could provide the same content that S/4HANA Cloud or also the BTP ABAP environment provide to allow the integration directly in Build Work Zone of the Client as a content provider.

entry.content: They look excited!

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano

I'm Viola from Indonesia, and I'm a second generation immigrant. I'm a minority in the big diverse nation. I live in the outskirts of the city and I'm the first person with bachelor in my family.

I aspire to be a Data Analyst and would really love to learn furthermore about SAP for data analysis and business. I eager to learn and take certification for SAP so I could apply for the job for Data Analyst with confidence and professional knowledge,

Regards,

Viola

entry.title: Enhancing SAP Analytics Cloud Dashboards with Image-Based Filters
entry.content:
In today's data-driven world, visual appeal and interactivity play a crucial role in how users engage with dashboards. In SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC), we often use filters to segment data based on different criteria. In this blog, I’ll share an approach to implementing image-based filters in the dashboard. Instead of a traditional checkbox for filtering, I utilized images as clickable filters, enhancing user experience while making the data selection process more intuitive.

Implementation Overview

I created a simple dashboard with continent data. To create an interactive image-based filter, I set up five script variables, each defined as an integer and initialized with a default value of 1. These script variables are  linked to images representing different continents, enabling effective tracking of user interactions.

CSS

To provide users with visual feedback when they interact with the images, I created two CSS classes.

 

.highlight-image {
    border: 2px solid #000000;
    background-color: #eaf0f0; /* Highlight color */
    opacity: 0.7; /* Slightly transparent to indicate selection */
}

.normal {
    /* Normal state styling */
}

 

When an image is clicked, it receives the highlight-image class, making it visually distinct. Clicking the image again reverts it to the normal class.

Script

For the first continent image, I implemented the following JavaScript code in the on-click edit script.

 

ScriptVariable_1 = ScriptVariable_1 + 1; // Increment the script variable

var Script_Array = [ScriptVariable_1, ScriptVariable_2, ScriptVariable_3, ScriptVariable_4, ScriptVariable_5];
var CC_Array = ["Africa", "Asia", "Europe", "North America", "South America"]; // Array of continents
var emptyArray = ArrayUtils.create(Type.string); // Create an empty array for filtering
var j = 0; // Index for the empty array

// Loop through script variables to build the filter array
for (var i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
    if (Script_Array[i] % 2 === 0) { // Check if the script variable is even
        emptyArray[j] = CC_Array[i]; // Add the corresponding continent to the empty array
        j++;
    }
}

// Apply filters based on selected images
if (emptyArray.length === 0) {
    // If no images are selected, apply filter for all continents
    Population.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter("Continent", CC_Array);
    GDP_Per_Capita.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter("Continent", CC_Array);
    Inflation_Rate.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter("Continent", CC_Array);
    Tax_Revenue.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter("Continent", CC_Array);
    Export_Import_Value.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter("Continent", CC_Array);
    Interest_Rate.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter("Continent", CC_Array);
    Continent_Details.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter("Continent", CC_Array);
} else {
    // If images are selected, apply the corresponding filters
    Population.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter("Continent", emptyArray);
    GDP_Per_Capita.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter("Continent", emptyArray);
    Inflation_Rate.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter("Continent", emptyArray);
    Tax_Revenue.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter("Continent", emptyArray);
    Export_Import_Value.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter("Continent", emptyArray);
    Interest_Rate.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter("Continent", emptyArray);
    Continent_Details.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter("Continent", emptyArray);
}

// Toggle CSS class for image highlighting based on script variable state
if (ScriptVariable_1 % 2 === 0) {
    Image_1.setCssClass('highlight-image'); // Apply highlight class if even
} else {
    Image_1.setCssClass('normal'); // Revert to normal class if odd
}

console.log(emptyArray); // Log the current empty array for debugging

 

Refresh Functionality

The dashboard also includes a refresh image that resets all filters and returns the dashboard to its initial state. When clicked, the following code executes.

 

// This code is executed when the refresh image is clicked

// Remove dimension filters from all data sources related to the "Continent"
Population.getDataSource().removeDimensionFilter("Continent"); // Removes filter from Population chart
GDP_Per_Capita.getDataSource().removeDimensionFilter("Continent"); // Removes filter from GDP Per Capita chart
Inflation_Rate.getDataSource().removeDimensionFilter("Continent"); // Removes filter from Inflation Rate chart
Tax_Revenue.getDataSource().removeDimensionFilter("Continent"); // Removes filter from Tax Revenue chart
Export_Import_Value.getDataSource().removeDimensionFilter("Continent"); // Removes filter from Export/Import Value chart
Interest_Rate.getDataSource().removeDimensionFilter("Continent"); // Removes filter from Interest Rate chart
Continent_Details.getDataSource().removeDimensionFilter("Continent"); // Removes filter from Continent Details chart

// Reset the CSS class of all images to 'normal'
// This visually indicates that no images are currently selected
Image_1.setCssClass('normal'); // Reset Image 1
Image_2.setCssClass('normal'); // Reset Image 2
Image_3.setCssClass('normal'); // Reset Image 3
Image_4.setCssClass('normal'); // Reset Image 4
Image_5.setCssClass('normal'); // Reset Image 5

 

This code removes all dimension filters related to the continent from each chart and table in the dashboard, ensuring that all data is displayed. Additionally, it resets the CSS class of all images to normal, visually indicating that no images are selected.

How It Works

  1. Incrementing the Script Variable: Each time an image is clicked, its associated script variable increments by 1. This allows us to track whether the image is selected (even) or unselected (odd).

  2. Building the Filter Array: The script uses a for loop to iterate through all script variables. If a variable is even, the corresponding continent from CC_Array is added to the emptyArray.

  3. Applying Filters:

    • If the emptyArray is populated (indicating that at least one image is selected), the dashboard applies filters based on the selected continents.
    • If no images are selected (the emptyArray is empty), the filter is set to include all continents from CC_Array.

  4. Visual Feedback: The script toggles the CSS class for each clicked image based on the state of its associated script variable, providing immediate visual feedback to the user.

  5. Reusability: This logic is repeated for all images with the respective other script variables, ensuring a consistent user experience across the dashboard.

  6. Resetting Filters: The refresh button removes all applied filters, resetting the dashboard to its original state and displaying all data, while also reverting all images to their default visual style.

Dashboard Output

The dashboard, built with sample continent data, displays images representing each continent.

Initially, I clicked on Africa, Asia, Europe, and South America, which resulted in those images being highlighted and filters applied solely to the selected continents.

When I re-clicked any of the highlighted images, they returned to their normal state, and the corresponding filters were removed.

Also, clicking the refresh image in the dashboard resets all filters, restoring the dashboard to its initial state with all data visible.


Conclusion

This blog covered the implementation of an image-based filtering system in SAP Analytics Cloud, allowing users to visually filter with images. This approach enhances user interaction and makes data exploration more intuitive, offering a valuable technique for improving dashboards.

Hope this inspires you to enhance your own dashboards!

Note

Please be aware that using this method may lead to performance issues when applied to dashboards with a large number of KPIs. It is recommended to implement this approach for smaller dashboards with fewer KPIs to ensure optimal performance.

entry.title: Re: Fiori standard application similar to transaction FB7...
entry.content: This only works for apps you have already available in your system AND that you have already access to. Still, best case scenario you will find the tcode in Fiori, which is not a newer or modern version of that app - which was the focus of the question. Opening FB60 in Fiori is still using FB60

entry.title: Re: 发布标准价时报错

Error message CK168 is only a follow-up message caused by other error messages collected before.

应该有其他error。

entry.title: Re: Creation of Additive Costs in SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/7f47a6d9441c46ac86c96fd27f6015f0/f105ae2323f24754a4396f8003391bdc.html

entry.title: Re: On-Premise, Backend programming, ECC - where are you?
entry.content:
Remember, there is no such thing as "on-premise" in real English.
"Premise" is concept.
"Premises" is a location.

"https://collectivecontent.agency/2018/04/19/should-i-say-on-premise-or-on-premises-it/"

entry.title: previous month amount for /3f7 and /3f9 in simulation without epf basis and pension basis changes
entry.content:
hi,

we have implemented posting gl assign to wage type /3f7 and /3f9 for posting through system from sep24 if employee takes retro of previous month  without EPF Basis and pension basis changes then previous month amount for /3f7 and /3f9 is coming in posting simulation also. /3f7 and /3f9 values should be according to current month only if without EPF Basis and pension basis changes.

/3F9 PF adm chrgs and  /3F7 EDLI contri is coming incorrect amount in simulation without EPF Basis and pension basis changes in retro case wih any reason system add previous month amount for /3f7 and /3f9 

values in current month. 

If previous month arrear then it is ok. but without arrear if system take retro then system add previous month /3f7 and /3f9 values. for your information we take posting through system from current month its before it was mannual for /3f7 and /3f9 values only.

if you have any solution pls suggest.

entry.content: I am facing the same issue can anyone pls help

entry.title: Re: Crystal Report Viewer Chart Font Issue
entry.content:
updated the default printer and checked off dissociate checkbox, still having the issue.

I've sent you the updated report.

entry.title: BIB: Employee replication Error "Pernr 0000000 not permitted" in SLG1
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

We are in process of enabling BIB configuration between EC to SAP ECC system. During this process when we are replicating existing employee form EC to ECC system we are getting an error message in SLG1 as "pernr 00000 not permitted" . We observed that this issue is only coming for existing employee replication and not coming during new hire replication.

Since the employee (pernr) is sourced from Employee Central we have maintained NUMKR feature with External. We have no entries maintained in the employee key map table: ECPAO_EE_KMAP. When we are replicating new employee, we noticed that new pernr is getting auto created in the table : ECPAO_EE_KMAP table while replicating.

Could you please suggest how to fix the error " Pernr 000000 not permitted". ? 

Also do we have to manually maintain entries in the Table ECPAO_EE_KMAP while replicating for existing users (these users are in Employee central and SAP ECC systems already) ? If so how can we maintain the entires in this table or will it get auto replicate similar to New hires cases.

Appreciate your support.

Best Regards,

Jisha

entry.title: Packing material issue to vendor scenario
entry.content:
Hi Team Please suggest the solution

Business wants to procure FG from the vendor and send the packing material to vendor and ask them to pack the FG in business packing material and take the FG and wanted to track the how much packing material left with vendor.

in this case FG procure cost include PO price (purchase cost + packing service cost)

Please suggest the solution.

entry.title: How to set up Catalog Approval flow base on Commodity code in SAP Ariba?
entry.content: Hello Experts, In SAP Ariba, I am trying to set up Catalog Workflow based on the Commodity code. I used the field 'Supplier.Subscription.Categories.UniqueName'. However, Ariba does not seem to recognize the condition and adds Customer Admin. The catalog is locally loaded by the Buyer. Can we use 'Subscription.Supplier.Categories.Uniquename' for locally managed catalogs or is it used only for catalogs managed by the suppliers?

entry.title: Re: Prompt values in scripting in SAC
entry.content:

Is there a way to suppress the prompt dialogue and set the values in prompt screen and trigger the query execution to fetch the results?

entry.title: Re: How to implement Multitenancy of HTML5 Application Re...
entry.content:
In order to fix the html5 credential error: 

 

{"written_at":"2022-02-07T06:42:06.209Z","written_ts":1644216126209000000,"csn_component":"-","correlation_id":"467c314c-404f-4bd5-4d5e-45fdf7e33250","type":"log","logger":"nodejs-logger","layer":"/Dynamic routing","level":"info","container_id":"10.0.201.22","component_type":"application","component_id":"7bbdb628-2e17-414d-96ea-17ae7fc78a50","component_name":"mtcap","component_instance":-1,"source_instance":-1,"organization_id":"a394c404-5c9e-4752-a602-b2172473de86","organization_name":"asmtsmartloadersand","space_id":"e6d19e1a-6987-4c03-9685-60aee9097849","space_name":"backend","request_id":"467c314c-404f-4bd5-4d5e-45fdf7e33250","msg":"Could not get html5 repo token from subscriber subaccount subtest01 fetching from provider subaccount Error: Error getting client_credentials token for html5-apps-repo-rt from subaccount subtest01 errorRequest failed with status code 401"

 

You need to do two things:

1) add the html5 repo runtime as as a binding to your mtx service

2) add "cds.requires.html5-repo: true" to your package.json of your mtx service

Documentation to simplified dependency management.
